user.title: Add Prana Recuperator Manually
user.description:
Enter the MAC address of your Prana device.
Ensure Bluetooth is enabled on your Home Assistant host and the Prana device is powered on and nearby.{discovered_list_if_any}

authenticate.title: Authentication
authenticate.description: Enter the password for your Prana device '{name}'. The default is '0000'.

error.invalid_mac: The MAC address format is invalid.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the device. Please check the MAC address and ensure the device is powered on and in range.

abort.already_configured: This Prana device is already configured.
